face_closeup_turnaround.intent: top high-definition face close-up plus bottom front, side and rear full-body turnaround, matching the reference image structure
face_closeup_turnaround.when_to_use: Default for character multiview unless the user explicitly requests the older detail-heavy interface layout.

layout.sheet_intent: identity-first production sheet for one character: top face proof, bottom three-view full-body proof
layout.aspect_ratio: 4:5 or 3:4 vertical board preferred; 16:9 allowed when downstream requires landscape
layout.resolution: 4096x5120 preferred for vertical board; 4096x2304 allowed for landscape
layout.background: neutral studio gray or dark gray production board matching reference style
layout.grid: two horizontal zones: top large face close-up occupying about 45 percent height, bottom three equal columns occupying about 55 percent height
layout.dividers: clean thin white or neutral panel dividers between top and bottom and between the three bottom views

view_plan.framing: head and upper shoulders, face centered, clear eyes, mouth, nose, hairline, skin texture, makeup and earrings/accessories if present
view_plan.purpose: locks face identity, original character appearance, makeup, hair structure, expression tone and facial material realism

view_plan.framing: full character from head to feet, neutral standing pose, arms readable, feet visible when possible
view_plan.purpose: proves front silhouette, costume shape, body proportion, textile fall and front identity markers

view_plan.framing: full character side profile from head to feet, same pose energy, no costume redesign
view_plan.purpose: proves side profile, hair volume, garment thickness, body line, sleeve/strap/hem structure and carried silhouette

view_plan.framing: full character rear view from head to feet, same scale as front and side views
view_plan.purpose: proves back design, hair fall, closures, rear costume construction and rear identity markers

critical_requirements: This is the default branch for 多视图/角色.
Top zone must be one large high-definition face close-up, not a small portrait thumbnail.
Bottom zone must contain exactly three full-body views: front, side and back.
The face close-up and all three full-body views must preserve the same original character appearance and makeup unchanged.
Keep costume style, silhouette, textile construction, accessories, hair and body proportion consistent between all views.
Do not add expression sheets, gesture modules, color palettes or extra detail boxes unless the user requests the 多细节界面版 branch.
negative_constraints: no different face between top and bottom views
no altered makeup or changed original character appearance
no missing front side back full-body views
no replacing the top face close-up with a poster portrait
no extra detail interface boxes unless explicitly requested

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Create one CHARACTER_FACE_CLOSEUP_TURNAROUND_SHEET for <character_name> (<character_short_id>) using <desc> and the reference images. Use the default 面部放大版 branch: one large high-definition face close-up across the top, and three bottom full-body views in equal columns: front, side and back. Preserve the original character appearance and makeup unchanged, same face, hair, skin tone, body proportion, costume style, textile construction, accessories and render style across all views. Use clean production-sheet dividers and no extra detail interface boxes.

review_focus: top high-definition face close-up is large and identity-readable
bottom has exactly front, side and back full-body views
same face identity and original makeup across top and bottom
same costume style, silhouette and textile construction across all views
no detail-interface modules unless explicitly requested

detail_interface.intent: legacy detail-heavy production interface with turnaround, costume architecture, accessories, gesture and face-state modules
detail_interface.when_to_use: Use only when the user explicitly asks for 多细节界面版, detail interface, costume/accessory modules, expression/gesture panels, color palette or production UI panels.

layout.sheet_intent: production turnaround and multi-detail interface proof board for one character
layout.background: dark gray production board #1a1a1a with subtle grid

columns.right: 35% costume architecture, accessories, gesture and face states

view_plan.purpose: locks face, body proportion, costume silhouette and status markers
proves volume, layering and camera-ready identity
proves profile, hair structure, garment thickness and carried silhouette
proves back design, hair fall, costume closures and rear identity markers

view_plan.role: costume, symbolic detail, gesture and face states
view_plan.purpose: documents existing details without replacing the main identity

critical_requirements: Use this branch only when explicitly requested.
Output must be CHARACTER_DETAIL_INTERFACE_SHEET, not the default face close-up turnaround sheet.
Apply the subject invariant lock before arranging modules.
Preserve original character appearance and makeup unchanged across all views.
Preserve same face, hair, skin tone, body proportion and costume logic across all modules.
negative_constraints: no copied identity from layout reference
no altered makeup or changed original character appearance

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Create one CHARACTER_DETAIL_INTERFACE_SHEET for <character_name> (<character_short_id>) using <desc> and the reference images. Use the 多细节界面版 branch only: production UI layout with color/status tokens, full-body turnaround, costume architecture, accessories, gesture and face-state modules. Preserve the original character appearance and makeup unchanged across all panels.

review_focus: explicit 多细节界面版 request is present
full-body turnaround and detail modules are both present
original character appearance and makeup unchanged across all modules
no invented marks, props, weapons or rank symbols

input_roles.main_reference_image: Locks original character identity, appearance, makeup, face, hair, body proportion, costume and style.
input_roles.supporting_reference_images: Only supplement expression, pose, costume layer or local detail.

must_preserve: same original character appearance and makeup unchanged
same face identity, hair structure, skin tone and body proportion
same costume silhouette, layering, textile construction and role markers
same era, culture, social tier and narrative pressure
same signature accessories, scars, makeup, ritual marks or status details already present in the design
same render style and material logic
may_vary: front, side and rear angle for default branch
front, three-quarter, side and rear angle for detail interface branch
expression state within upstream emotional direction
detail crop for face, costume or identity features

layout.sheet_intent: top face close-up plus bottom front, side and back full-body views for one character
layout.aspect_ratio: 4:5 or 3:4 vertical board preferred; 16:9 allowed when downstream requires landscape
layout.resolution: 4096x5120 preferred for vertical board; 4096x2304 allowed for landscape
layout.background: neutral studio gray or dark gray production board matching reference style

identity_badge.fallback: preserve a clean top-left badge plate for post-production overlay

view_plan.purpose: locks face identity, original character appearance, makeup, hair and expression tone
proves front silhouette, costume construction and body proportion
proves side profile, garment thickness and carried silhouette
proves rear costume construction, hair fall and back identity markers

critical_requirements: Default output must be CHARACTER_FACE_CLOSEUP_TURNAROUND_SHEET.
Top zone must be one large high-definition face close-up.
Bottom zone must contain exactly three full-body views: front, side and back.
Apply the subject invariant lock before arranging modules.
Preserve original character appearance and makeup unchanged across all views.
Preserve same face, hair, skin tone, body proportion and costume logic across all views.
No scene or environment narrative.
No props, weapons or hand-held objects unless explicitly required by the user.
Top-left identity badge must show <character_short_id> or preserve a clean overlay-ready badge plate.
negative_constraints: no copied identity from layout reference
no altered makeup or changed original character appearance
no missing front side back full-body views

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Create one CHARACTER_FACE_CLOSEUP_TURNAROUND_SHEET for <character_name> (<character_short_id>) using <desc> and the reference images. Use the default 面部放大版 branch: one large high-definition face close-up across the top, and three bottom full-body views in equal columns: front, side and back. Apply subject_invariant_lock, preserving the original character appearance and makeup unchanged, same face, hair, skin tone, body proportion, costume style, textile construction, accessories and render style across all views. Use clean production-sheet dividers, top-left identity badge, and no extra detail interface boxes unless explicitly requested.

review_focus: default branch is 面部放大版 unless user explicitly requests 多细节界面版
top high-definition face close-up is large and identity-readable
bottom has exactly front, side and back full-body views
same original character appearance and makeup unchanged across all views
same face identity across top and bottom views
top-left short ID badge or overlay-ready badge plate
no invented marks, props, weapons or rank symbols
